backend_tasks.name: Show Server Folder Structure
backend_tasks.description: Displays the folder structure of the backend/server directory.

backend_tasks.name: Install Backend Dependencies
backend_tasks.description: Installs necessary Python packages inside venv.

backend_tasks.name: Regenerate requirements.txt
backend_tasks.description: Updates requirements.txt based on current venv dependencies.

backend_tasks.name: Run Database Migrations
backend_tasks.command: cmd /c "backend\run_task.bat flask db migrate && backend\run_task.bat flask db upgrade"
backend_tasks.description: Applies schema changes to the database.

frontend_tasks.name: Show Frontend Folder Structure
frontend_tasks.description: Displays the folder structure of the frontend/src directory.

frontend_tasks.name: Stop Frontend App
frontend_tasks.description: Stops the frontend development server running on port 5173.
